title: make test fails in v5.038 (probably in make_tracing_sc)
body:
When building verilator 5.038 for Debian, it failed during 'make test'. The relevant part from build log follows:
```
make[4]: Leaving directory '/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir/examples/make_tracing_sc/obj_dir'

-- RUN ---------------------
obj_dir/Vtop +trace

        SystemC 3.0.1-Accellera --- Dec 19 2024 14:36:25
        Copyright (c) 1996-2024 by all Contributors,
        ALL RIGHTS RESERVED
[0] Model running...

Enabling waves into logs/vlt_dump.vcd...
[43000] fastclk is 5 times faster than clk

*-* All Finished *-*
- sub.v:45: Verilog $finish

-- COVERAGE ----------------
/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir/bin/verilator_coverage --annotate logs/annotated logs/coverage.dat
Total coverage (8/36) 22.00%
See lines with '%00' in logs/annotated

-- DONE --------------------
To see waveforms, open vlt_dump.vcd in a waveform viewer

make[3]: Leaving directory '/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir/examples/make_tracing_sc'
make[2]: Leaving directory '/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir'
dh_auto_test: error: make -j2 test "TESTSUITEFLAGS=-j2 --verbose" VERBOSE=1 returned exit code 2
make[1]: *** [debian/rules:79: override_dh_auto_test] Error 25
make[1]: Leaving directory '/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir'
make: *** [debian/rules:28: binary] Error 2
```

Full build log: https://salsa.debian.org/electronics-team/verilator/-/jobs/7957955/raw
